children.label: A
children.text: not more than $40,000,000 may be made available for programs referred to in relating to demilitarization of defense industries;section 5902(b)(4) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: not more than $15,000,000 may be made available for programs referred to in relating to military-to-military contacts;section 5902(b)(6) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: not more than $25,000,000 may be made available for joint research development programs pursuant to ;section 5931 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: not more than $10,000,000 may be made available for the study, assessment, and identification of nuclear waste disposal activities by the former Soviet Union in the Arctic region;

children.label: E
children.text: not more than $25,000,000 may be made available for Project PEACE; and

children.label: F
children.text: not more than $10,000,000 may be made available for the Volunteers Investing in Peace and Security (VIPS) program under chapter 89 of title 10.1See References in Text note below.1
